info.title: AdoMcpServer
info.description: AdoMCP Server — MCP server for database schema discovery and SQL execution (SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Oracle).

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: AdoMCP Server — MCP server for database schema discovery and SQL execution.

options.name: --http
options.description: Start in HTTP/SSE mode instead of the default stdio mode. [default: False]

options.name: --stdio
options.description: Start in stdio mode (default; accepted for compatibility). [default: False]

options.name: --allow-any-sql
options.description: Enable the execute_sql MCP tool. Omit for read-only/safe mode. [default: False]
